security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://simworld-api.fly.dev http://localhost:8000; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:

bundle.shortDescription: SimWorld — run the future before it happens
bundle.longDescription: SimWorld runs large-scale agent-based simulations to predict how audiences will react to scenarios before they happen.
